<Meta title="Tokens/Effects/Shadows" />

# Shadows

Box shadow tokens used to create depth and elevation across components like cards, modals, and dropdowns. Shadows should only be used as a hover or interaction effect — not as a static decorative treatment.

The five levels are shown below. Hover over each box to see the shadow effect.

<div className="sb-contained-canvas">
  <Canvas of={EffectsStories.Shadows} />
</div>
